category_sources: source_facts.description says libunicode is a modern C++20 Unicode library.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name gives libunicode; source_facts.repo is the official contour-terminal/libunicode repository.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage/source_facts.repo point to the official GitHub repository, used as the README documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a C++20 Unicode library; source_facts.executables lists unicode-query.
